steps.title: One real solution → discriminant = 0
steps.content: Rearrange $4x^2 + 21 = 48x + r$ to standard form: $4x^2 - 48x + (21 - r) = 0$. So $a = 4$, $b = -48$, $c = 21 - r$. Exactly one solution means $b^2 - 4ac = 0$.

steps.title: Plug in and solve for r
Answer
steps.content: The required value is $r = -123$, so -123 is correct.
